IParticle - Interface in com.lulow.justtype.model.particles
Contract for a single particle in a particle system.

Contract for a particle emitter that spawns and manages particles on a pane.
isCritical(int) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.GameView
Returns whether the given time is at or below the critical threshold.
isDead() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.particles.AshParticle
Returns true when the particle is fully transparent.

Returns whether the particle should be removed from the scene.
